base_reserialized_note: large_artifacts/qwen35_4b_universal_curriculum/merged/base_reserialized (weights b654e033d525d87cbbd746bb681d80813c4b00d8e6202cb3edcfb6dfa3b416db) is a weight-identical reserialization of the same pinned revision used ONLY as the paired eval arm of the benchmark events; it is never a training or merge input anywhere in this lineage
carrier: clean chain: stage 1 trains a FRESH rank-32/alpha-64 QLoRA adapter on the raw pinned HF base (no warm start; LoRA-B zero-initialized, so the delta starts at zero); stages 2-6 warm-start from the previous stage's adapter, every stage trained on the raw pinned HF base; the stage-6 adapter is merged onto the raw HF base to produce the zero-root composite (lifecycle 22); stage 7 trains a FRESH rank-32/alpha-64 adapter ON the zero-root composite via --model-path (no warm start) over the exposure-matched count_walk stream and is merged onto that composite

clean_chain.blend_root_forbidden: NO undocumented root adapter exists anywhere in this lineage and none may ever be vendored into this cell; the six-stage chain from a zero-initialized adapter is fully documented by lifecycle 22's committed receipts (copied byte-identically into data/lineage/provenance/) and stage 7 is documented by this cell's own run receipts

determinism.expectation: same repo .venv (pinned torch/transformers/peft/bitsandbytes) + same GPU class (RTX 4090) + fixed seeds reproduce the recorded adapter hashes; on a different stack the produced hashes are verification aids and equivalence must be re-established behaviorally through the trusted benchmark gateway

directive: standalone-reproducibility gate (AGENTS.md non-negotiables; docs/quality_gates.md): this cell evaluates a non-base checkpoint and therefore carries the complete model-reproduction package in its own directory — the six zero-root stage datasets, the three lineage trainer copies, the merger copy, the stage-7 trainer and training stream, and lifecycle 22's receipts as provenance documents

final_merge.adapter: stage 7 output (count_walk), fresh adapter on the zero-root composite
final_merge.base_model: the zero-root composite (tree 414f582950bf60fed2fe462cd141ab98d0f772087b4f9c6bc5aa12f03f379e7d) via the merger's --base-model

merger.base_model: stages 1-6 merge onto the raw pinned HF revision (the merger's default --base-model); stage 7 merges onto the zero-root composite via --base-model

model.role: the raw pinned HF revision is the base model for training stages 1-6 and their final merge; stage 7 trains on and merges onto the zero-root composite produced by that merge

stage7_confirmation_arms.amendment: pre-event review amendment B1 (2026-07-17, qwen35_4b_count_walk_menders_confirmation, no seed consumed): this eval-only cell evaluates three non-base composites and therefore carries the complete in-cell reproduction package per docs/quality_gates.md (including eval-only cells) — stages 1-6 rebuild the zero-root parent from the copied ordered datasets, and stage 7 trains BOTH lifecycle-27 arms (replay_ctl7 first, then count_walk) with the frozen recipe below and merges each onto that composite

scripts/rebuild_clean_chain.py.role: byte-identical copy of lifecycle 27's single-arm chain rebuilder (documentation; it pins its OWN source-cell manifest bytes and is not this cell's executable path — scripts/rebuild_lineage.py is)

data/sft_blend.jsonl.role: the 1,280-row shared replay-core source both arm streams draw from (materialized by lifecycle 27's scripts/materialize_streams.py)

data/sft_count_walk.jsonl.role: the 160-row FRESH count-don't-walk treatment corpus feeding the count_walk stream

scripts/stage7_wrappers/merge_trained_ar.role: lifecycle 27's fail-closed production merger wrapper (byte-identical copy; the rebuild replays its merge through scripts/merge_adapter.py --base-model directly) (carried at scripts/stage7_wrappers/ in this cell; scripts/train_trial.py and scripts/merge_trained_arm.py here are the stage-8 adapted wrappers, pinned by their own run receipts)

scripts/stage7_wrappers/train_trial.py.role: lifecycle 27's fail-closed production trainer wrapper (byte-identical copy; its committed-at-HEAD and compute-review gates belong to the source cell; the rebuild replays its recipe through scripts/train_think.py directly) (carried at scripts/stage7_wrappers/ in this cell; scripts/train_trial.py and scripts/merge_trained_arm.py here are the stage-8 adapted wrappers, pinned by their own run receipts)

recipe.note: identical frozen recipe for both arms: a FRESH rank-32/alpha-64 adapter trained on the zero-root composite via the trainer's --model-path at fixed seed 85, then merged onto that composite; recorded byte-for-byte by lifecycle 27's committed training/merge receipts

stage8_replay_compound.amendment: lifecycle 29 (2026-07-17, design freeze, no seed consumed): stage 8 REPLAY COMPOUNDING onto the count_walk composite — ONE fresh rank-32/alpha-64 adapter trained on the FULL 2,240-row replay pool (data/sft_blend.jsonl, the same pool the chain's replay stages and both stage-7 streams draw from) with the chain's established replay-refresh recipe at the fixed fresh training seed 86, then merged onto that composite via scripts/merge_adapter.py --base-model. The stage7_confirmation_arms block above was edited ONLY to re-point the byte-identical lifecycle-27 wrapper copies to scripts/stage7_wrappers/ and to update the verification commands to this cell; every sha in it is unchanged.

composite.note: TODO-PIN(post-merge): the orchestrator fills the three null slots from the committed merge receipt after the merge publishes; they are verification aids, never the reproduction path — null pre-merge keeps rebuild_lineage.py --verify-inputs green while failing the benchmark runner's fail-closed require_todo_pins_filled()

dataset.role: the FULL replay pool (the superset the stage-7 streams drew their 1,280-row replay cores from), byte-identical copy of the lifecycle-27 committed original

parent_composite.rebuild_path: IN-CELL: the stage-7 count_walk arm of this same manifest rebuilds this composite (stages 1-6 zero-root chain, then the stage-7 count_walk arm at seed 85); the committed receipt and its copy are verification aids only

production_wrappers_pins_deferred.reason: scripts/train_trial.py and scripts/merge_trained_arm.py (the stage-8 adapted wrappers) carry orchestrator-filled TODO-PIN constants that change after their artifacts publish; each is authenticated by hash inside its own run receipt and by the local design receipt's code pins; the rebuild replays the recipe through scripts/train_think.py and scripts/merge_adapter.py directly

recipe.note: the established replay-refresh recipe: identical hyperparameters to the chain's replay stages (stage 1 replay_refresh, stage 4 replay_after_close) and to the stage-7 arms (which train on a composite via --model-path); a FRESH rank-32/alpha-64 adapter on the count_walk composite at fixed seed 86, merged onto that composite

stage8_replay_compound.seed_provenance: 86 verified grep-fresh in training-seed contexts repo-wide at design time (the chain's taken training seeds are 42/43/44/47/51/55/85); no substitution required

dataset.filename_note: the source dataset file is named targeted_standard.jsonl and does NOT match the arm name close_xi; copied as stage03_close_xi__targeted_standard.jsonl to preserve both names

dataset.composition: 1,280-row shared replay core (family+kind stratified from sft_blend.jsonl at namespace seed 55171) + the 160-row FRESH single-kind count-don't-walk treatment (sha 21e6f5cb705f447f7a4dfc9bff24673f798f48df312b99a6cf686505855ee096, 160 u_count_walk at construction seed 77191, 20 rows per formalism across all eight reused machine formalisms) + 80 exact-match replay fillers; three-axis MILP exposure-matched against replay_ctl7.jsonl with zero delta

stage7_base.note: stage 7 trains a FRESH rank-32/alpha-64 adapter on the zero-root COMPOSITE via the trainer's --model-path (no warm start), then merges onto that composite via scripts/merge_trained_arm.py; the paired exposure-matched control arm replay_ctl7 (data/replay_ctl7.jsonl, sha 94e8259ec03800d0a4dcbf8075252c5180a668e2da74569fcf62497cf0f9de5a) trains first and is a control, not part of the headline lineage
